description: A customer wants to book a 3-night vacation package to Orlando, including flights, hotel, and theme park tickets.

nodes.task_description: Gather customer preferences for flights (dates, airline) and hotel (quality, location).

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all necessary details to build the package.

nodes.task_description: Search for available flights, hotels, and park tickets that match the criteria.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds suitable options for all components of the package.

nodes.task_description: Bundle the components, apply a package discount, and present the final itinerary and price.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a cohesive package and presents it to the customer.
